fill-in-blank.sentence: After losing the match, she stayed ___ and practiced even harder.
fill-in-blank.hint: Able to recover quickly from difficulties

fill-in-blank.sentence: Scientists need to ___ the data before publishing their results.
My car ___ on the highway yesterday.

multiple-choice.question: What does 'break down' mean in: 'The car broke down'?
multiple-choice.hint: Used when a machine stops functioning

multiple-choice.question: Which sentence uses 'make up' correctly?
options: A) They made up after the argument
B) He made up the car
C) She made up the book
D) They made up the house
multiple-choice.answer: A) They made up after the argument
multiple-choice.hint: 'Make up' can mean to reconcile after arguing

word-forms.question: Complete: 'Her ___ helped her overcome many challenges.'
